title: GOOD: RX thread uses K_MSEC timeout on lora_recv instead of blocking forever
description: lora_l2.c lines 149-150: lora_recv() is called with K_MSEC(RX_TIMEOUT_MS) timeout, not K_FOREVER. This allows the thread to periodically check atomic_get(&running) and exit cleanly when stop() is called. Without a timeout, the thread would block indefinitely and require abort() for shutdown.
